zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter FitzRoger於1065年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特時，他的父親Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester25歲，母親Adeliza Eunice Baalun15歲。他和Emmeline Berthe de Pitres de Baluun至少有2個女兒。他在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾利藍尼 普利馬 普利奧利被列為became a monk in his old age。他去世於1129年2月26日在威爾士蒙姆爾阿加文尼享年64歲，埋葬在威爾士蒙姆爾利藍尼 普利馬 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter FitzRoger于1065年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特时，他的父亲Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester25岁，母亲Adeliza Eunice Baalun15岁。他和Emmeline Berthe de Pitres de Baluun至少有2个女儿。他在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾利藍尼 普利馬 普利奧利被列为became a monk in his old age。他去世于1129年2月26日在威尔士蒙姆爾阿加文尼享年64岁，埋葬在威尔士蒙姆爾利藍尼 普利馬 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter FitzRoger was born in 1065, in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester, was 25 and his mother, Adeliza Eunice Baalun, was 15. He had at least 2 daughters with Emmeline Berthe de Pitres de Baluun. His occupation is listed as became a monk in his old age in Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom. He died on 26 February 1129, in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, at the age of 64, and was buried in Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter FitzRoger est né en 1065, à Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Adeliza Eunice Baalun, avait 15 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Emmeline Berthe de Pitres de Baluun. Sa profession de son indiquée est became a monk in his old age à Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 26 février 1129, à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter FitzRoger 1065 in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester 25 und seine Mutter Adeliza Eunice Baalun 15. Er hatte mit Emmeline Berthe de Pitres de Baluun mindestens 2 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als became a monk in his old age in Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 26. Februar 1129 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales und wurde in Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter FitzRoger è nato il nel 1065 nel Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Adeliza Eunice Baalun, aveva 15 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie con Emmeline Berthe de Pitres de Baluun. La sua occupazione è indicata come became a monk in his old age nel Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Morì il 26 febbraio 1129, nel Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter FitzRogerが1065年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスターで生まれた時，父Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucesterは25歳，母Adeliza Eunice Baalunは15歳であった。彼はEmmeline Berthe de Pitres de Baluunとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。イギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアランソニー プリマ プリオリーでの職業はbecame a monk in his old ageと記録されている。彼は1129年2月26日にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーで64歳で死去し，ウェールズモンモウスシュアイアランソニー プリマ プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter FitzRoger(이)가 1065년 영국 그루스스터실르 그루스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Adeliza Eunice Baalun(은)는 15세였다. 그는 Emmeline Berthe de Pitres de Baluun(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 랜서니 프리마 프리오리에서 became a monk in his old age이었다. 그는 1129년 2월 26일 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 몬모우스실르 랜서니 프리마 프리오리에 묻혔다.

mn.Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England: Gloucester, Glevum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter FitzRoger nasceu em 1065, em Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Adeliza Eunice Baalun, tinha 15 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Emmeline Berthe de Pitres de Baluun. Sua profissão aparece como became a monk in his old age em Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 26 de fevereiro de 1129, em Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter FitzRoger родился в 1065 г. в местности глоусестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeliza Eunice Baalun, 15. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Emmeline Berthe de Pitres de Baluun.  Он работал по профессии became a monk in his old age в местности ллантони прима приори, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Он умер 26 февраля 1129 г. в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности ллантони прима приори, монмоутшир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter FitzRoger nació en 1065, en Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Adeliza Eunice Baalun, tenía 15 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Emmeline Berthe de Pitres de Baluun. Su ocupación registrada era became a monk in his old age en Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Murió el 26 de febrero de 1129, en Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Gales.
